commit.subject: LU-18402 tests: recovery-small interop testing (2)
commit.message:
LU-18402 tests: recovery-small interop testing (2)

This is a fortestonly patch to trigger recovery-small
interop testing for master client with b2_15 server.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
  serverjob=lustre-b2_15 serverbuildno=94 \
  clientdistro=el9.4 serverdistro=el8.10 \
  mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=8 \
  testlist=recovery-small

Test-Parameters: env=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
  serverjob=lustre-b2_15 serverbuildno=94 \
  clientdistro=el8.10 serverdistro=el8.10 \
  mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 ostcount=8 \
  testlist=recovery-small
